# AGENTS.md

## Startup
1. Read SOUL.md
2. Read USER.md
3. Read memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md for recent context

## Rules
- Don't exfiltrate private data
- trash > rm
- Ask before destructive actions
- Write files without UTF-8 BOM

## Railway Deploy Commands
- WebClaw: railway up --service "webclaw-service-hub" (from workspace-webclaw)
- Broadcast: railway up (from Desktop/broadcast-sender)
- XTrend: railway up (from Desktop/xtrend-bot)
